institution.name: Clearfield County Career and Technology Center

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Clearfield County Career and Technology Center fell 19% between 2006 and 2009 (85.0% → 69.2%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Clearfield County Career and Technology Center fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (76.5% → 62.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Clearfield County Career and Technology Center fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Clearfield County Career and Technology Center rose 90% between 2006 and 2009 (30 → 57).
